steps.title: Move from general to specific
steps.content: The first sentence says KONB serves the local Ojibwe-speaking community. The next sentence lists the actual broadcasts that do that work, so the transition should introduce specific examples of the general claim.

steps.title: Choose the detailing transition
steps.content: Choice A signals replacement. Choice B signals concession despite a problem. Choice D signals result. None of those relationships fits a sentence that specifies how the station serves the community. The answer is C.
